# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.9-slim

# Set working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy requirements file
COPY requirements.txt .

# Install dependencies
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Copy application code
COPY . .

# Expose ports for services
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

# Run command when container starts
CMD ["gunicorn", "app:app", "--workers", "3", "--bind", "0.0.0.0:80"]
CMD ["uwsgi", "/etc/uwsgi/apps-enabled/app.ini"]
CMD ["postgres", "-D /var/lib/postgresql/data"]
CMD ["redis-server"]

# Copy configuration files
COPY docker-compose.yml /app/
